chunks.text: Sanjay Mehrotra named Vice Chair of SIA - EECS at Berkeley Alumnus Sanjay Mehrotra (EECS B.S. ’78/M.S. ’80) has been named the 2018 Vice Chair of the Semiconductor Industry Association (SIA). The SIA is a trade association and lobbying group positioned as “the voice of the U.S. semiconductor industry.” Mehrotra, who is currently CEO of Micron, led the growth of SanDisk Corporation from start-up in 1988 to Fortune 500 company in 2016. He holds 70 patents and has published articles on nonvolatile memory design and flash memory systems. Categories Alumni Industry View Open Faculty Positions
